paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently at 6.32, with a change of -3.95% compared to the prior close and -20.9% over the last 21 sessions. The company has seen 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both published on 2026-07-23. These articles discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus, and the admission of shares of Common Stock, respectively.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 16 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form announcing the appointment of four new officers, an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
